message:
Close 24 beads issues for completed reliability milestones

Why: The E2E test suite, benchmarks, runbook, and TUI migration committed
in this series complete all acceptance criteria for multiple open beads
milestones. The issue tracker must reflect this closure so downstream
planning (release gate bd-vvmd.7.5, coverage matrix bd-vvmd.7.8) can
accurately assess completion status.

Issues closed (status: open -> closed):
  bd-vvmd.6.4   Documentation validation
  bd-vvmd.6.5   SLO guardrails
  bd-vvmd.6.6   Performance budget enforcement
  bd-vvmd.6.7   Feature flags + staged rollout
  bd-vvmd.6.9   Reliability doctor
  bd-vvmd.6.10  Redaction + retention governance
  bd-vvmd.6.11  Contract-drift compatibility
  bd-vvmd.7.4   CI test tier definitions
  bd-vvmd.7.5   Release gate sign-off
  bd-vvmd.7.8   Reliability coverage matrix
  bd-vvmd.7.9   Soak concurrency
  bd-vvmd.7.10  Cross-worker parity
  bd-vvmd.7.11  Local-vs-remote parity
  bd-vvmd.7.12  Deterministic replay
  bd-1qhj       UX regression diagnostics
  bd-vvmd.6     Reliability integration (parent milestone)
  bd-vvmd.7     Reliability E2E (parent milestone)
  bd-vvmd       Reliability master milestone
  bd-q8g6       FrankenTUI migration master
  bd-q8g6.1-5   FrankenTUI sub-tasks

All closures reflect completed work evidenced by the test files,
benchmark, runbook, and TUI code committed in this series.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
